title: Banksia GUI
text: Home * User Interface * GUI * Banksia GUI BanksiaGUI logo Banksia GUI , a free chess GUI , UCI and Chess Engine Communication Protocol compliant, cross platform [1] , written by Nguyen Pham , first published in 2019 [2] . BanksiaGUI binaries are available from the BanksiaGUI site . Contents 1 Chess Variants 2 Screenshot 3 Features 4 See also 5 Forum Posts 6 External Links 7 References Chess Variants [ edit ] Standard chess Chess960 or Fischer Random Chess (FRC) Screenshot [ edit ] BanksiaGUI [3] Features [ edit ] A brief summary Playing and analyzing chess games Tournament Manager Database view and create Book view and create PolyGlot - book format High Configurable Interface Detailed information thinking process Support statics table of Lc0 Support WDL statics Engine Benchmark Chess960 (Fischer Random Chess) Syzygy Tablebases Lichess Bots Internet Chess Server Network connect and play Algebraic Chess Notation Extended Position Description (EPD) Forsyth-Edwards Notation (FEN) Portable Game Notation (PGN) Support of 3 languages for the GUI UCI protocol WinBoard protocol 2 Windows Clipboard for Games and Positions Mac OS Linux See also [ edit ] Banksia Arena ChessGUI UCI WinBoard Forum Posts [ edit ] Banksia - Yet another Chess Tournament Manager by Nguyen Pham , CCC , July 01, 2019 Banksia GUI released by Nguyen Pham , CCC , November 18, 2019 leela by Stuart Cracraft , CCC , March 29, 2021 » Leela Chess Zero , iPhone External Links [ edit ] Banksia GUI GitHub - Banksia - a Chess tournament manager  » Banksia Banksia GUI tutorial YouTube Videos References [ edit ] ↑ A portable, simple, desktop workbench for chess players and analysts ↑ Banksia GUI released ↑ Banksia GUI Up one Level
